Welcome

D & A Tree Service Inc

D & A Tree Service Inc has been serving Bakersfield and the surrounding region with premium tree removal services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Bakersfield Trusts D & A Tree Service Inc

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

D & A Tree Service removed a large, dying oak tree from my backyard. They were professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. I was impressed with their attention to safety and would definitely recommend them!
